iterations.ai_content: There are 524 one-kilometer grid cells in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas. This count is based on spatial intersection with storm-surge zones for the current climate scenario. No additional filtering was applied beyond the municipality boundary. The result includes all intersecting grid cells.

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[7.9,57.9],[8.1,57.9],[8.1,58.1],[7.9,58.1],[7.9,57.9]]]]}'), 4326), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"MultiPolygon","coordinates":[[[[7.9,57.9],[8.1,57.9],[8.1,58.1],[7.9,58.1],[7.9,57.9]]]]}'), 4326), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
